feat.critical_failure: You fail to open the lock, and your shot makes it much harder to open. Future attempts to Pick the Lock or Blast the Lock take a –4 circumstance penalty.
feat.critical_success: You open the lock, or you achieve two successes toward opening a complex lock.
feat.failure: You fail to open the lock, and your shot makes it harder to open. Future attempts to Pick the Lock or Blast the Lock take a –2 circumstance penalty.
feat.name: Blast Lock
feat.success: You open the lock, or you achieve one success toward opening a complex lock.
feat.text: Sometimes taking the shortest distance between two points involves removing an obstacle or two. You shoot your firearm at a lock within 10 feet. Make an attack roll against the DC required to Pick the Lock.

traits.name: Attack
traits.text: An ability with this trait involves an attack. For each attack you make beyond the first on your turn, you take a multiple attack penalty.

traits.name: Gunslinger
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the gunslinger class.
